## Summary

Describe the problem and user-visible outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm knip`
- [ ] `pnpm audit --audit-level high`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Risk and safety

- [ ] I used synthetic data and included no credentials or customer traffic.
- [ ] I documented changes to persistence, raw-message access, reports, or defaults.
- [ ] Replay and PoC behavior remains inert until explicit user action.
- [ ] I added tests for new behavior or bug fixes.
